name: dreamer
description: AI短剧工作台 - 从剧本到成品的全流程AI短剧生产平台

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,worker,frontend -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.db:install: npm run db:generate -w packages/backend && npm run db:push -w packages/backend
